DS-Drift · W14 · a11y.css

A11y drift coverage

Visual mirror of dashboard/src/styles/a11y.css. Read-only; production CSS is the SSOT. Phase 1 / W14 of the design-system drift workstream (Plan: 20m-me-workspace-yousleepwhen-masc-mcp-h-curious-dusk.md).

how this file reaches runtime
Import path
dashboard/src/main.ts  →  dashboard/src/styles/global.css:37  →  dashboard/src/styles/a11y.css
Verified by

Phase 0 reference
PR Phase 0 production-css audit (orphan triage cleared the false negative)

prefers-reduced-motion toggle

CSS-only :has(:checked) override; mirrors a11y.css:73-99
Motion Toggling "reduce" stops all keyframe animations and zeroes transition-duration in the demo scope below.
mirrors production a11y.css:74-95 (animation: none under prefers-reduced-motion)

Animation classes neutralized under reduce

Each animated dot below corresponds to a selector enumerated in a11y.css. With "reduce" selected, all of them halt in place.

reduce active · animation: none

Focus ring (WCAG 2.4.7)

Tab through the controls below to see the keyboard ring
mirrors production a11y.css:5-8 (:focus-visible — global accent ring)

Global :focus-visible — button

Default for every interactive element. Outline 2px var(--color-accent-fg) with 2px offset.

mirrors production a11y.css:5-8 + 11-13 (:focus-visible vs :focus-not-visible)

Global :focus-visible — link & input

Mouse clicks suppress the ring; keyboard focus shows it. Click vs Tab — the production guard at a11y.css:11-13 strips browser default outline on pointer focus.

Skip to top
mirrors production a11y.css:22-27 (.focusable — brass double-ring opt-in)

.focusable opt-in — brass double-ring

SPEC v0.4 atom 13. Layered on top of the global ring: 1px solid brass + 3px translucent brass glow. Token: var(--focus-ring).

mirrors production a11y.css:29-34 (.focusable.is-err — error swap)

.focusable.is-err — error swap

Brass swapped for status-err. Token: var(--focus-ring-err).

sr-only & skip-link patterns

visually hidden, AT-discoverable
mirrors production a11y.css:37-47 (.sr-only)

.sr-only — visually hidden text

Hover the chip to reveal what assistive tech reads. The text exists in the DOM, just clipped to a 1×1 pixel.

16 keepers online (announced to screen readers: 16 keepers currently online)
mirrors production a11y.css:50-71 (.skip-link:focus)

.skip-link — visible on focus only

The very first Tab-stop on this page exposes a fixed-position skip link in the upper-left corner. Press Tab at the top of the page — or click the chip below and Shift+Tab back — to see it.

WCAG 2.4.1 — bypass blocks of repeated content

Phase 2 candidate · raw color audit

non-token literals inside a11y.css fallbacks

a11y.css uses var(--token, fallback) patterns. The fallbacks below are raw rgba/hex literals embedded in the production CSS as a defensive measure when tokens aren't loaded. Phase 2 should promote each to a dedicated token (or remove the fallback if SSOT load order is guaranteed).

a11y.css line selector property raw fallback Phase 2 action
L6 :focus-visible outline rgba accent-45 fallback drop fallback; require --accent-45 from tokens
L26 .focusable:focus-visible box-shadow rgb-from-triplet (brass-glow) replace with --focus-ring token (already exists)
L33 .focusable.is-err:focus-visible box-shadow rgb-from-triplet (status-err-glow) replace with --focus-ring-err token (already exists)
L63 .skip-link:focus background page-bg hex fallback drop fallback; --color-bg-page is always loaded
L64 .skip-link:focus color fg-primary hex fallback drop fallback
L77 .pixel-avatar--has-blocker (reduce) box-shadow rgba red literal promote to --color-status-blocker-glow
Source: dashboard/src/styles/a11y.css (99 LOC) · last touched in masc-mcp PR for #3915 · cascade verified by orphan-triage · Plan: 20m-me-workspace-yousleepwhen-masc-mcp-h-curious-dusk.md
